name: Scienture Holdings, Inc.
business: Scienture LLC is a specialty pharmaceutical company focused on the commercialization and development of products for the treatment of cardiovascular (CVS) and Central Nervous System (CNS) diseases. It has one FDA-approved product, Arbli (losartan potassium oral suspension) for hypertension, and an in-licensed commercial product, REZENOPY (naloxone HCl nasal spray) for opioid overdose, along with a pipeline of product candidates.

exposures.sentence: Scienture LLC is a specialty pharmaceutical company focused on the commercialization and development of products for the treatment of cardiovascular (CVS) and Central Nervous System (CNS) diseases.

catalysts.sentence: On March 13, 2025, the FDA approved the SCN-102 NDA to be launched as ARBLI TM (losartan potassium) Oral Suspension, 10mg/mL.
Scienture LLC commercially launched the product in the third quarter of 2025.
Scienture LLC plans to initiate a Phase 1 single dose study in healthy adults in 2026, following submission of an IND, if the IND is cleared by the FDA.

Scienture LLC anticipates submitting an IND and, if cleared by the FDA, initiating a Phase 1 single dose study in healthy adults in 2026 to conduct an initial assessment of safety and tolerability of SCN-107.

catalysts.event: Regulatory approval for SCN-104 and SCN-106
catalysts.sentence: Management expects SCN-104 and SCN-106 to achieve regulatory approval in 2027 or 2028, with commercialization projected to begin in 2028.
SCN-107 to achieve regulatory approval in 2028 or 2029, with commercialization projected to begin in 2029.

tamClaims.claim: Hypertension affects nearly half of adults in the U.S. (approximately 119.9 million people).
tamClaims.sentence: According to the Centers for Disease Control, hypertension, or high blood pressure, affects nearly half of adults in the U.S. (48.1%, or approximately 119.9 million people).

tamClaims.claim: Opioid misuse: 7.8 million people misused opioids in the prior year.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the 2024 National Survey on Drug Use and Health, among people aged 12 or older in 2024, 2.7 percent (or 7.8 million people) misused opioids in the prior year.

tamClaims.claim: 71,542 drug overdose deaths for the 12 months ending October 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the Centers for Disease Control, new preliminary data predicts that there were 71,542 drug overdose deaths for the 12 months ending in October 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Migraine affects over 39 million individuals in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: Migraine is estimated to affect over 39 million individuals in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: More than 7 million CVADs are inserted each year in the United States.
tamClaims.sentence: More than 7 million CVADs are inserted each year in patients in the United States.

tamClaims.claim: About 58% of catheter occlusions are thrombotic.
tamClaims.sentence: About 58% of catheter occlusions are thrombotic, resulting from the formation of a thrombus within, surrounding, or at the tip of the catheter.
